info.description:
This is the Consorsbank API description in the area of api management. The description will cover the domain savings-plan incl. their management.
Performing requests require Authorization Header with Bearer JWT Token.
info.title: Consorsbank Investment - savings-plan

put.description: Updates the attributes of an OrderChange. Does not place it at a TradingVenue. Returns the updated OrderChange.

post.description: Places an OrderChange at a TradingVenue. Returns a reference to an OrderTransactionState.
Creates an OrderEntry. Does not place it at a TradingVenue. Returns a reference to the new object.

put.description: Updates the attributes of an OrderEntry. Does not place it at a TradingVenue. Returns the updated OrderEntry.

post.description: Places an OrderEntry at a TradingVenue. Returns a reference to an OrderTransactionState.

get.description: Returns a collection of Orders. Filter parameters are optional and can be combined.

post.description: Cancels an Order at a TradingVenue. Returns a reference to an OrderTransactionState.
Create an OrderChange. Does not change it at a TradingVenue. Returns a reference to an OrderChange object.
Creates a QuoteOrderEntry. Requests a quote at a TradingVenue that is not accepted yet.

409.description: Quote order offer cannot be provided

get.description: Returns a QuoteOrderEntry which contains the Quote of the specified TradingVenue.

put.description: Updates the attributes of an QuoteOrderEntry. Does not place it at a TradingVenue. Returns the updated QuoteOrderEntry which contains the Quote of the specified TradingVenue.

409.description: Quote order entry cannot be updated

post.description: Accepts a QuoteOrderEntry at a TradingVenue. Returns a reference to an OrderTransactionState.
Requests a quote at a TradingVenue that is not accepted yet.

409.description: Quote order offer cannot be provided

get.description: Returns the current authentication trust level of your session

post.description: Elevate Authentication Level to authLevel 2

delete.description: Deactivates the SessionTan. Returns its current state.

post.description: Activates the SessionTan. Returns its current state.

get.description: Returns a collection of ClearingAccounts for a SecuritiesAccount.
Returns the Performance of a SecuritiesAccount.
Returns a collection of Positions for a given SecuritiesAccount.
Returns a collection of PositionHistories for a SecuritiesAccount.
Returns a collection of TradingVenues for a Security.
Lists all SavingsPlans under a SecuritiesAccount.

parameters.description: The securities account number for which to get the savings plans
parameters.name: securitiesAccountNo

put.description: Updates the attributes of a SavingsPlanChange. Returns the updated SavingsPlanChange.

post.description: Authorizes a SavingsPlanEntry. Returns a reference to an SavingsPlanTransactionState.
Returns a QrCodeOut.
post.summary: Obtain QR Code challenge for SavingsPlanChangeEntry

post.description: Creates a SavingsPlanEntry. Returns a reference to the new object.

put.description: Updates the attributes of an SavingsPlanEntry. Returns the updated SavingsPlanEntry.

post.description: Authorizes a SavingsPlanEntry. Returns a reference to an SavingsPlanTransactionState.
Returns a QrCodeOut.
post.summary: Obtain QR Code challenge for SavingsPlanEntry

post.description: Change a SavingsPlan. Returns a reference to the new object.
Delete a List of SavingsPlans.

put.description: Updates the attributes of a OneTimePaymentChange. Returns the updated OneTimePaymentChange.

post.description: Authorizes a OneTimePaymentChange. Returns a reference to an SavingsPlanTransactionState.
Returns a QrCodeOut.
post.summary: Obtain QR Code challenge for OneTimePaymentChangeEntry

post.description: Creates a OneTimePaymentEntry. Returns a reference to the new object.

put.description: Updates the attributes of an OneTimePaymentEntry. Returns the updated OneTimePaymentEntry.

post.description: Authorizes a OneTimePaymentEntry. Returns a reference to an SavingsPlanTransactionState.
Returns a QrCodeOut.
post.summary: Obtain QR Code challenge for OneTimePaymentEntry

get.description: Lists all OneTimePayments under a SecuritiesAccount.

parameters.description: The securities account number for which to get the one time payments for a savings plan
parameters.name: securitiesAccountNo

parameters.description: The savings plan number of the one time payments
parameters.name: savingsNo

post.description: Change an OneTimePayment. Returns a reference to the new object.
Delete an OneTimePayment.

parameters.description: The securities account number for which to get the one time payments for a savings plan
parameters.name: securitiesAccountNo

get.description: Lists all clearing accounts under a SecuritiesAccount.

parameters.description: The securities account number for which to get the savings plans
parameters.name: securitiesAccountNo

get.description: Get SavingsPlanDetails for given savings no under a SecuritiesAccount

parameters.description: The securities account number for which to get the savings plan details
parameters.name: securitiesAccountNo

label.title: Label of the collection of categories

fieldId.title: Name of respective field for the category

isEstimated.title: Indicates whether or not the given values are estimated. If the values are estimated, returns 'true', otherwise returns 'false'

label.title: Description of respective field for the category

valueText.title: Value of category as specified by fieldId and label

categories.title: Cost document which contains cost details in json format

executionAmount.title: Number of equities which were bought or sold during order execution

orderSupplement.title: Additional property of order. Can be the following values: NORMAL, ICEBERG, IMMEDIATE_OR_CANCEL, FILL_OR_KILL

stop.title: Stop trigger for stop orders and One Cancels the Other Orders

stopLimit.title: Limit for Stop Buy/Loss Limit Orders and One Cancels the Other Stop Buy/Loss Limit Orders. Marks the market limit for an Order after a stop trigger has been fired

trailingDistance.title: Marks the distance used to calculcate the current stop trigger of a trailing order

trailingLimitTolerance.title: Necessary to calculate the limit after stop trigger in case of a Trailing Stop Limit Order

validityDate.title: Validity date (YYYY-MM-DD). Default value: last day of the month
